audit_input.task_goal: make the one-legged hopper move forward while staying upright and controlled

audit_output.reason: Without a video, task success cannot be confirmed. Reward hacking is detected due to the potential for the agent to exploit the 'alive_bonus' by merely surviving without performing the task, especially since 'healthy_pose' (for staying upright) and 'energy_cost' (for controlled movement) are currently unweighted, despite being part of the task goal 'staying upright and controlled'.
